name: harness-forge
description: Hydrate a project to run looping, latticed agentic workflows. A kernel that scaffolds and operates a typed knowledge lattice â€” nine declarative layers Ă— five scopes Ă— a maturity state machine â€” driven by the engine (defineâ†’createâ†’validate at the smallest signal-yielding scope, the signal minted from a real verifier command's exit status), the compass (scanâ†’rank), and the regeneration loop (operateâ†’ledgerâ†’distillâ†’patterns). Ships an operating agent roster (a harness-builder orchestrator Â· harness-advancer Â· harness-auditor Â· harness-distiller), stdlib gates that mechanize typed naming, the dependency partial-order, lattice structural validation, and staleness propagation, a consent-gated installer (wire.py) that wires the blocking protected-verifier gate plus audit-trail and staleness-cascade hooks into the project's own worker loop, an advisory session hook that flags naming/staleness on save (never blocks), and a read-only lattice-query MCP over the project's .harness/ state. Self-contained.

harness_dir.title: Harness state directory
harness_dir.description: Path to the project's `.harness/` directory (the durable lattice state â€” lattice.json, the layer dirs, signals/, ledger/) that the read-only lattice-query MCP reads. Optional â€” leave unset to run the engine, compass, gates, and agent roster without live retrieval.
